rationale: Pairwise disjointness of an indexed family {A_i} (def:indexed-family) is the condition that distinct members have empty (def:empty-set) binary intersection A_i cap A_j (def:intersection). All three were missing.
notes: Under-specified []. Here the BINARY def:intersection IS used (A_i cap A_j of two members), in contrast to the indexed-intersection definition (0027). licensing_quote grounds intersection + empty-set; def:indexed-family is the operand.
